Authentication and Encryption with Additional Data (AEAD) (gxcr/tokens/aead.h)
[Authentication and Encryption with Additional Data (AEAD) API (gxcr/aead.h)]

Detailed Description

The AEAD token processes AEAD requests.

Before packets are processed with this interface, basic data structures need to be initialized at the gxcr_aead level.

The setup function sets initialization-time fields in the token. This must be called before data is processed with the process functions aead_process() or aead_process_start().

The processing functions perform the crypto/digest operation. The result of the crypto operation is stored in the destination memory provided as an argument to the process function, the result of a digest operation is appended to the end of the result data.

Functions

int aead_setup (gxcr_aead_context_t *op_ctx)
 Function to set up for AEAD processing.
int aead_process_packet_start (gxio_mica_context_t *mica_context, gxcr_aead_context_t *op_ctx, void *packet, int packet_len, int assoc_data_len, void *dst, int dst_len, int icv_len, int encrypt, int geniv, int geniv_len)
 Function to perform AEAD processing on a packet.
int aead_process_packet (gxio_mica_context_t *mica_context, gxcr_aead_context_t *op_ctx, void *packet, int packet_len, int assoc_data_len, void *dst, int dst_len, int icv_len, int encrypt, int geniv, int geniv_len)
 Function to perform AEAD processing on a packet.
int aead_process_packet_generic (gxio_mica_context_t *mica_context, gxcr_aead_context_t *op_ctx, void *packet, int packet_len, int assoc_data_len, int aad_len, void *dst, int dst_len, int icv_len, int encrypt, int geniv, int geniv_len)
 Function to perform AEAD processing on a packet.

Variables

gxcr_token_info_t aead_token_info
 Token for AEAD processing.
gxcr_token_info_t aead_aes_gcm_token_info
 Token for AEAD processing with AES-GCM.

Function Documentation

int aead_setup ( gxcr_aead_context_t *  op_ctx  ) 

Function to set up for AEAD processing.

Parameters:
op_ctx - An AEAD context initialized via gxcr_aead_init_context().

int aead_process_packet_start ( gxio_mica_context_t *  mica_context,
gxcr_aead_context_t *  op_ctx,
void *  packet,
int  packet_len,
int  assoc_data_len,
void *  dst,
int  dst_len,
int  icv_len,
int  encrypt,
int  geniv,
int  geniv_len 
)

Function to perform AEAD processing on a packet.

This function kicks off the operation and returns immediately.

Parameters:
mica_context - An initialized MiCA context.
op_ctx - An initialized operation-specific AEAD context.
packet - The packet to be processed.
packet_len - Length, in bytes, of the packet to be processed.
assoc_data_len - Length, in bytes, of the data at the start of the packet, that is to be hashed but not encrypted.
dst - Destination memory for the result packet. If dst is equal to packet, the memory pointed to by packet is overwritten. The memory pointed to by packet and by dst must not overlap otherwise.
dst_len - Length, in bytes, of destination memory for the result packet.
icv_len - Length, in bytes, of the Integrity Check Value in the result packet.
encrypt - Encrypt then hash the packet if non-zero, hash then decrypt the packet if 0.
geniv - If none-zero and equals AEAD_GENIV_REPLACE, generate and replace the geniv_len byte initialization vector(IV) at the end of the associate data. If equals AEAD_GENIV_INSERT, generate an initialization vector and embed it in the packet as the last part of the associated data. If AEAD_GENIV_NONE or 0, assume that the initialization vector is in the context record and in the packet.
geniv_len - Length, in bytes, of the initialization vector to be generated.
Returns:
0 on success, error code on failure.

int aead_process_packet ( gxio_mica_context_t *  mica_context,
gxcr_aead_context_t *  op_ctx,
void *  packet,
int  packet_len,
int  assoc_data_len,
void *  dst,
int  dst_len,
int  icv_len,
int  encrypt,
int  geniv,
int  geniv_len 
)

Function to perform AEAD processing on a packet.

This function blocks until completion.

Parameters:
mica_context - An initialized MiCA context.
op_ctx - An initialized operation-specific AEAD context.
packet - The IPv4 packet to be encapsulated.
packet_len - Length, in bytes, of the packet to be processed.
assoc_data_len - Length, in bytes, of the data at the start of the packet, that is to be hashed but not encrypted.
dst - Destination memory for the result packet. If dst is equal to packet, the memory pointed to by packet is overwritten. The memory pointed to by packet and by dst must not overlap otherwise.
dst_len - Length, in bytes, of destination memory for the result packet.
icv_len - Length, in bytes, of the Integrity Check Value in the result packet.
encrypt - Encrypt then hash the packet if non-zero, hash then decrypt the packet if 0.
geniv - If none-zero and equals AEAD_GENIV_REPLACE, generate and replace the geniv_len byte initialization vector(IV) at the end of the associate data. If equals AEAD_GENIV_INSERT, generate an initialization vector and embed it in the packet as the last part of the associated data. If AEAD_GENIV_NONE or 0, assume that the initialization vector is in the context record and in the packet.
geniv_len - Length, in bytes, of the initialization vector to be generated.
Returns:
0 on success, error code on failure.

int aead_process_packet_generic ( gxio_mica_context_t *  mica_context,
gxcr_aead_context_t *  op_ctx,
void *  packet,
int  packet_len,
int  assoc_data_len,
int  aad_len,
void *  dst,
int  dst_len,
int  icv_len,
int  encrypt,
int  geniv,
int  geniv_len 
)

Function to perform AEAD processing on a packet.

This function blocks until completion.

Parameters:
mica_context - An initialized MiCA context.
op_ctx - An initialized operation-specific AEAD context.
packet - The IPv4 packet to be encapsulated.
packet_len - Length, in bytes, of the packet to be processed.
assoc_data_len - Length, in bytes, of the data at the start of the packet, that is to be hashed but not encrypted.
aad_len - Length, in byte, of the AAD of AES-GCM algorithm.
dst - Destination memory for the result packet. If dst is equal to packet, the memory pointed to by packet is overwritten. The memory pointed to by packet and by dst must not overlap otherwise.
dst_len - Length, in bytes, of destination memory for the result packet.
icv_len - Length, in bytes, of the Integrity Check Value in the result packet.
encrypt - Encrypt then hash the packet if non-zero, hash then decrypt the packet if 0.
geniv - If none-zero and equals AEAD_GENIV_REPLACE, generate and replace the geniv_len byte initialization vector(IV) at the end of the associate data. If equals AEAD_GENIV_INSERT, generate an initialization vector and embed it in the packet as the last part of the associated data. If AEAD_GENIV_NONE or 0, assume that the initialization vector is in the context record and in the packet.
geniv_len - Length, in bytes, of the initialization vector to be generated.
Returns:
0 on success, error code on failure.

Variable Documentation

gxcr_token_info_t aead_token_info

Token for AEAD processing.

gxcr_token_info_t aead_aes_gcm_token_info

Token for AEAD processing with AES-GCM.
